ads.author: James Pound
ads.title: Williams Fun-Fest Pinball Machine
ads.description: I bought this Williams Fun Fest in non-working condition and restored it to excellent condition with: - new power cable - new fuses - new ball - new rubbers - full cleaning - waxed playfield - replaced burned-out bulbs - leaf switch adjustments for faster gameplay It's restored to excellent condition and plays without issues. For the most part fixing it was just a matter of cleaning up, adjusting some springs, and some oil here or there. I'm selling because I'm upgrading to a solid state dot matrix machine.

ads.author: James Pound
ads.title: Bally Amigo Pinball Machine
ads.description: This Bally Amigo pinball machine is in great shape. Everything works. It has been regularly cleaned and waxed, and I’ve done a number of improvements and tune-ups including: - new ball - replaced pop bumper domes - added the correct spinner sticker - tuned all leaf switches - replaced burned-out bulbs - rubbers are recently replaced This is an excellent entry into pinball. My kids have loved this game and it has seen a lot of play at our house. Selling to move up to a solid state dot matrix pinball machine.

ads.author: Darla Miller
ads.title: Pinball machine
ads.description: hello, welcome number 133rd message. This is an electro magnetic pinball machine the last of the series from Chicago Coin. It comes with manuals, wiring schematics and diagrams, alot of history for pinball enthusiasts. I just listed it without knowing the full history of my husbands retirement childhood hobby. Stock photo. Machine is stored and wrapped. Correction it was Blue Max but changed some painting to 'the Red Baron" New updated listing to MAKE AN OFFER https://pinside.com/pinball/machine/blue-max MARKETPLACE REQUIRES a price, because this is not EBay.

ads.author: Bob Warren
ads.title: Williams Swinger EM Pinball Machine
ads.description: The Swinger Pinball machine was manufactured in 1972 by Williams and is the two-player version of the Fun Fest pinball machine. This machine is an electromagnetic machine without all of the complex computer parts. It is in good condition with a clean playfield and back glass. This is pick up only. Price is $900 OBO.

ads.author: Ronnie Driver
ads.title: Romstar
ads.description: Kageki (1988) is a 1-on-1 fighting arcade game, licensed by Romstar, where players control a bandaged street fighter navigating nine rounds against a motorcycle gang, the Warriors. Very rare find.

ads.title: Space Invaders Trimline Vintage Arcade Restored to NEW

Machine is fully functional including coin slots. For a collector, this is a really nice find. Located in Lacombe LA, pickup only.

ads.author: Allen Robinson
ads.title: Capcom Bowling, Upright Arcade, Capcom 1988
ads.description: Vintage Upright Arcade – Capcom Bowling (Capcom, 1988) Price: $325 OBO Capcom Bowling upright cabinet. Condition: • Cabinet is very old and needs some love. • Monitor powers on, image is good, but probably needs new caps for long-term reliability. • Lights come on. • Sound works. • Controls are functional. • Sold as-is. • Serious buyers only.

ads.author: Allen Robinson
ads.title: Capcom Bowling, Upright Arcade, Capcom 1988 (Project Cab)
ads.description: Vintage Upright Arcade – Capcom Bowling (Capcom, 1988) Price: $200 (or best offer) This is a Capcom Bowling upright arcade cabinet in a Centipede Cabinet. Condition: - Cabinet is very old and needs a lot of love. - Monitor does not currently power on — likely needs new caps. - Nothing comes on at the moment; best to start troubleshooting with the power supply and work your way from there. - Sold as-is. Highlights: - Classic Capcom sports arcade with bowling gameplay. - Upright cabinet design from the golden age of arcades. - Great candidate for restoration or display in a retro collection. Important: - Price is $200, or best offer - Serious buyers only. Price Breakdown: Capcom Bowling PCS ($40) Control Panel and Trackball ($60) Cabinet ($100) CRT (dunno if its dead so $0?) Wiring, coin door, misc ($40)

ads.author: Allen Robinson

ads.author: Robert Stotts
ads.title: Classic Shinobi Full Size Arcade Game
ads.description: This is a full size original Shinobi arcade game. Fully functional and working. It has the original PCB motherboard and I have installed an eprom conversion kit to prevent it from not playing anymore after a certain amount of plays, but I also still have the original EPROMs in case you want to convert it back. I also have the original PCB motherboards for Aliens and Robocop if you are interested. in that as well.

ads.author: Byron Gaddis
ads.title: California Speed Video Driving Arcade Game
ads.description: Up for your consideration is a California Speed Arcade driving game. It plays as is but would definitely benefit from a LCD monitor. I’ve had this machine for about 8 years and it has just started buzzing when you turn it on. I don’t know anything about these but I did talk to an arcade dealer and he said that it’s likely inference or the sound board. This machine does have the ability to be paired with another machine. Will consider trading up or down for a slot machine, pinball machine, vintage gas pump, man cave stuff.

ads.title: Carnival Arcade Game
ads.description: I have Carnival arcade game made by Gremlin/Sega in 1980 . Game plays great. I will not answer questions in the comments section. PM me if you interested. Asking $900.00 Firm. Located in Jacksonville, Florida. Shipping anywhere in the country will cost between $500.00-$750.00 through Beltman Logistics / STI.

ads.author: Dirk Smith Johnson
ads.title: Rare Williams OXO Pinball Machine
ads.description: Very rare Williams OXO pinball machine. Previously featured at the Roanoke Pinball Museum in Virginia. This is a unique electro-mechanical game that plays tic-tac-toe! This game has been in fully working condition until recently when it started blowing a fuse during game restart. It's most likely a switch contact somewhere that's broken, but I've been too busy to diagnose it, and I need the room, so I'm willing to sell it for less than I paid to someone who wants a unique game, and is willing to tinker with it. This game is basically in original condition except for being upgraded with $200+ worth of LEDs to make it brighter and more reliable.
